notes: This batch reopens results_ultra3_full_geometry_stage16_axis0.json as its own bounded result-only ultra family.
Source membership is bounded to the ultra3 result surface and does not merge in the catalog-adjacent ultra_big orphan or the earlier ultra strip batches.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; no direct A2-1 or A1 promotion from this batch

comparison_anchors.relevance: Provides continuity from the prior residual result-only pass and records the explicit decision to defer ultra3 next.
Provides the earliest ultra-strip macro anchor for scale and branch-count comparison.
Shows the closest prior geometry-bearing ultra family and its extra axis12 branch.
Shows the nearest non-geometry ultra continuation with matching stage16 and axis0_ab broad structure.
Shows the next bounded ultra orphan uses a different topology-plus-traj contract and should stay separate.
Shows catalog listing for ultra3_full_geometry_stage16_axis0 and ultra_big_ax012346.
Shows zero repo-held evidence-pack visibility for the current ultra3 orphan and the deferred ultra_big orphan.

runtime_expectations: The current surface stores one geometry-bearing ultra macro result with 4 sequences, 4 seeds, 48 stage16 entries, 128 axis0_ab entries, axis0_trials 256, axis0_cycles 64, and stage_states 4096.
The axis0_ab branch uses 32 absolute SEQ01 baselines and 96 SEQ02-04 deltas over a T1/T2, direction, init, gate, and repetition lattice.
The stage16 branch remains a small Se-centered perturbation surface inside the larger ultra shell.
The next remaining result-only orphan begins at results_ultra_big_ax012346.json.
failure_modes: Treating the current orphan as the same family as ultra4 because both carry berry flux.
Treating the current orphan as the same family as the final ultra sweep because both carry stage16 and axis0_ab branches.
Collapsing the axis0_ab branch into one uniform record contract even though it mixes absolutes and deltas.
Overstating the berry-flux layer as exact ±2pi.
Merging the deferred ultra_big orphan into the current batch because of catalog adjacency.

sims_split_rule.notes: This batch remains inside the separate sims source class and does not mix with ordinary theory/doc extraction.
